info.name: Finance Dashboard API
info.description:
Complete API testing collection for Finance Dashboard Backend.

## Setup
1. Start server: `node src/app.js`
2. Import this file in Postman
3. Run 'Step 1 - Login as Admin' first to get token
4. Token is auto-saved — all other requests will work automatically

## Demo Credentials
- Admin: admin@demo.com / password123
- Analyst: analyst@demo.com / password123
- Viewer: viewer@demo.com / password123

request.description: Check if server is running. Expected: 200 OK

exec: pm.test('Server is running', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ Server is ONLINE'); });

request.description: 🔑 PEHLE YEH RUN KARO! Token auto-save hoga.

exec: pm.test('Admin Login - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); const d = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('adminToken', d.data.token); console.log('✅ Admin Token saved! Role:', d.data.user.role); });
pm.test('Analyst Login - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); pm.collectionVariables.set('analystToken', pm.response.json().data.token); console.log('✅ Analyst Token saved!'); });
pm.test('Viewer Login - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); pm.collectionVariables.set('viewerToken', pm.response.json().data.token); console.log('✅ Viewer Token saved!'); });
pm.test('Get Profile - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); const d = pm.response.json().data; console.log('✅ Name:', d.name, '| Role:', d.role); });

pm.test('Register - 201 Created', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(201); const d = pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d.role).to.equal('VIEWER'); console.log('✅ Registered. Role auto-set to:', d.role); });
pm.test('Wrong Password - 401', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(401); console.log('✅ Correctly blocked!'); });
pm.test('No Token - 401', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(401); console.log('✅ Correctly blocked!'); });

pm.test('Summary - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); const d = pm.response.json().data; console.log('✅ Income:', d.totalIncome, '| Expenses:', d.totalExpenses, '| Net:', d.netBalance); });
pm.test('By Category - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); pm.response.json().data.forEach(c => console.log('📦', c.category, c.total)); });
pm.test('Trends Admin - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ Months:', pm.response.json().data.length); });
pm.test('Trends Analyst - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ Analyst can see trends'); });
pm.test('Viewer Trends - 403 FORBIDDEN', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(403); console.log('✅ RBAC Working! Viewer blocked'); });
pm.test('Recent - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ Recent count:', pm.response.json().data.length); });

pm.test('List Records - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); const d = pm.response.json().data; if(d.records.length > 0) pm.collectionVariables.set('recordId', d.records[0].id); console.log('✅ Total:', d.pagination.total, '| Pages:', d.pagination.totalPages); });
pm.test('Filter INCOME - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ INCOME records:', pm.response.json().data.pagination.total); });
pm.test('Filter EXPENSE - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ EXPENSE records:', pm.response.json().data.pagination.total); });
pm.test('Filter Category - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ Salary records:', pm.response.json().data.pagination.total); });
pm.test('Date Range - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ Q1 2024 records:', pm.response.json().data.pagination.total); });

pm.test('Create Record - 201 Created', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(201); const r = pm.response.json().data; pm.collectionVariables.set('recordId', r.id); console.log('✅ Record created! ID:', r.id); });
pm.test('Viewer Create - 403 FORBIDDEN', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(403); console.log('✅ RBAC Working! Viewer cannot create'); });
pm.test('Get Record - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); const r = pm.response.json().data; console.log('✅ Record:', r.amount, r.type, r.category); });
pm.test('Update Record - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ Updated amount:', pm.response.json().data.amount); });
pm.test('Delete Record - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ Soft deleted!'); });
pm.test('Validation - 400', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(400); console.log('✅ Validation errors:', JSON.stringify(pm.response.json().error.details)); });

pm.test('List Users - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); const u = pm.response.json().data; if(u.length > 0) pm.collectionVariables.set('userId', u[u.length-1].id); u.forEach(x => console.log('👤', x.name, x.role)); });

pm.test('Create User - 201', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(201); const u = pm.response.json().data; pm.collectionVariables.set('userId', u.id); console.log('✅ Created:', u.name, u.role); });
pm.test('Update Role - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ New role:', pm.response.json().data.role); });
pm.test('Deactivate - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ isActive:', pm.response.json().data.isActive); });
pm.test('Viewer Users - 403 FORBIDDEN', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(403); console.log('✅ RBAC Working!'); });
pm.test('Delete User - 200 OK', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ User deleted'); });
